EMAIL: GCASEY@SFTC.ORG. JUDGE: GERARDO C. SANDOVAL. CLERK: L. BARENG. (D514).

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LENDINGHOME FUNDING CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBERTS, JASON $302,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $2,776.72 ATTORNEY FEES, $94,743.24 INTEREST, $1,531.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $401,151.46, SEE SCANNED DOC

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2020 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2020 Continued To Dec-16-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiff Lendinghome Funding Corporations Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-03-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant Jason Roberts.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Lyssette Bareng. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Christine Mastromonaco, Esq. appeared for plaintiff LendingHome Funding Corporation.
Robert W. Johnson, Director of Mortgage Operation for plaintiff LendingHome Funding Corporation, was present via ZOOM, placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by respondent Jason Roberts.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract was filed on October 8, 2019.
Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents were personally served on defendant Jason Roberts on December 30, 2019.
Default as to defendant Jason Roberts was entered on February 10, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed on September 28, 2020.

Plaintiff LendingHome Funding Corporation submit the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Promissory Note dated March 7, 2017........................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Guaranty dated March 7, 2017...............................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff LendingHome Funding Corporation, and against the defaulted defendant Jason Roberts, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $302,100.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $94,743.24.
Attorney Fees - $2,776.72.
Costs - $1,531.50.

Total - $401,151.46.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare a revised proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Petitioner stipulates to the return of the exhibits.

Plaintiff Lendinghome Funding Corporations Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-23-2020 Continued To Nov-03-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
